queries.name: founder_execution
queries.query: (founder OR CEO OR operator) (shipping OR focus OR product OR customers OR execution) -filter:replies lang:en

queries.name: saas_validation_revenue
queries.query: (SaaS founder OR bootstrapped founder OR indie hacker) (validation OR customers OR revenue OR churn OR pricing) -filter:replies lang:en

queries.name: distribution_gtm
queries.query: (distribution OR go to market OR customer acquisition OR growth) (SaaS OR founder OR startup) -filter:replies lang:en

queries.name: customer_pain_product_direction
queries.query: (customer pain OR user problem OR product direction OR founder lesson) (software OR SaaS OR startup) -filter:replies lang:en

queries.name: local_business_software
queries.query: (local business software OR appointment reminders OR scheduling software OR SMB software) (founder OR SaaS OR startup) -filter:replies lang:en
